title: Cull Fewer Leaves
description: Cull leaves while looking hot! A continuation of Cull Less Leaves.
body: # Cull Fewer Leaves Cull Fewer Leaves skips rendering of inner leaf layers, improving performance. ## Performance In a worst-case scenario, overlooking a mangrove swamp, this mod can have up to a _**30% performance increase**_ (measured on low-end hardware). Instead of leaving just the outer layer of leaves, Cull Less Leaves also renders a certain amount of layers defined in the config. **[Also requires Sodium!](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** ## Why not just use [Cull Leaves](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)? Cull Leaves only renders the outermost layer of leaves, which can look quite ugly (see fast culling in image below), but **Cull Leaves improves performance more than Cull Fewer Leaves**. ## Comparison ![comparison](https://i.imgur.com/yMUQxMX.png) ### This is a fork of isXander's Cull Less Leaves mod!
